value:
I'm truly sorry to hear about this distressing experience on your journey, especially given your medical needs. The lack of accessible facilities on a train of that length is certainly something we take seriously.

To help us investigate and make this right, could you please share a few details: which train service this was (route and approximate date/time), and your booking reference if you have it? Once I have those, I can look into what happened and explore what we can do to support you—whether that's addressing the service failure directly or discussing compensation options.

Thank you for bringing this to us, and again, I apologize for the difficulty this caused.
